'''Yntrann''' was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="Journal11" /> located in the [[Yntrann system/Legends|Yntrann system]], a part of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="EAOC" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], after the [[Scandium Team]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]] was disbanded, the [[Ebranite]] former member of the team [[Rith Tar'ak]] was transferred to Yntrann, where she briefly [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] a small yet highly decorated [[Desert/Legends|desert]] warfare [[Task force/Legends|task force]] as part of one of the early Special Forces wilderness [[Regiment/Legends|regiments]]. Since leadership did not appeal to Tar'ak, she eventually requested a transfer to another branch of the Alliance and was stationed off-world.<ref name="Journal11" />

==Behind the scenes==
Yntrann was mentioned in "[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives (article)|Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]," a [[roleplaying game]] source article authored by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]] and [[Trevor J. Wilson]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and published in the [[November]] [[1996]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 11|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 11]].<ref name="Journal11" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Yntrann [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square O-3.<ref name="TEA" />
